signIn.title: Sign in to Seller Center
signIn.subtitle: Manage products, orders, and customer activity from your seller workspace.

otpRequest.title: Sign in with a one-time code
otpRequest.subtitle: Enter your seller email and we will send a sign-in code if the account is eligible.
otpRequest.successBody: If the account can use email OTP, a sign-in code will arrive shortly.

otpCode.title: Enter your sign-in code
otpCode.subtitle: We sent a one-time code to {email}.
otpCode.label: 6-digit code
otpCode.expiredBody: Request a new sign-in code to continue.

register.title: Create seller account
register.subtitle: Start with an account, then complete seller verification and store setup.
register.acceptTerms: I agree to the terms and privacy policy

googleLink.title: Link Google to your seller account
googleLink.subtitle: This Google email matches an existing password account.
googleLink.body: To protect your account, confirm that you want to link Google and enter your existing HiveSpace password.
googleLink.consent: I want to link this Google account to my existing HiveSpace account.
googleLink.sellerOnboarding: Google sign-in does not grant seller access by itself. Existing seller verification and store setup still apply.

errors.termsRequired: Accept the terms and privacy policy to continue.
errors.AccountNotAllowed: This account cannot access the selected app.
errors.EmailVerificationRequired: Verify your email before signing in.
errors.DuplicatePendingAccount: This email already has a pending account. Request another verification email to continue.
errors.SessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.InvalidOtpCode: That code is not valid. Check it and try again.
errors.OtpExpired: That code has expired. Request a new one to continue.
errors.OtpAttemptsExceeded: Too many incorrect attempts. Request a new code.
errors.GoogleFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed. Try again.
errors.GoogleEmailMissing: Google did not provide an email address for this account.
errors.GoogleEmailUnverified: Google did not verify this email address.
errors.GoogleLinkDeclined: Google linking was cancelled. You can sign in with your password, reset it, or choose another Google account.
errors.GoogleLinkExpired: This Google linking request expired. Start Google sign-in again.
errors.GoogleLinkFailed: Google account linking failed. Check your password and try again.
errors.googleConsentRequired: Confirm that you want to link Google before continuing.
errors.validationFailed: Check your information and try again.

image.alt: Seller order and storefront management workspace
image.heading: Keep your store ready for every order
image.body: Track listings, review order activity, and move from registration to selling with a secure HiveSpace session.
